g.text: The constraint-regularized Bayesian surrogate serves as a unified posterior predictive layer enabling forward uncertainty propagation, variance-based attribution, and observation-conditioned posterior updating.

text.style: font-size: 7px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #7a7a7a

g.text: 'Uncoupled pass' denotes the first-pass response; 'coupled steady state' denotes the converged coupled response.
